title: 2PCS/SET LONG HANDLE Crevice Cleaning Brush, Hard-Bristled Gap Scrub Brush,Toilet Cleaning Brush Tool, for Scrub Small Spaces, Kitchen, Bathroom, Corner, Grout, Sink, Window Tracks, Hinges
features: **Deep Cleaning Crevice: Dense and stiff bristles, Only 3mm thick, Easily clean deep into hard-to-reach crevices. A must-have cleaning tool for all housekeeper. Use it in the kitchen, bathroom, garage, pool to SAVE Time and Energy

**Easy To Clean & Storage: Long-handled & Narrow-ended scrub brush made of plastic handles and nylon bristles, Not break or bend, The bristles not easy to fall off and split, A Holes on the grip, easy hanging to save space and quick drying
**Remove Tough Grime: Black brush suitable for bathroom, kitchen, Scrubbing grease and limescale from gas cooker, faucet, shower.
**The crevice brush easily scrubs dirt out of nooks and crannies, The hard bristle crevice also be used to clean up tape as well as excess paint after remodeling home

**Multi-Situation: Suitable for hard-to-clean corners, such as sink rims, shower brackets, refrigerator seals, closet rails, pet feeders, car parts, kits recesses and more, gets your home sparkly clean and bright
